package rulecoverage

func PositiveRandNewsourceWithTimeNowPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "rand_newsource_with_time_now_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`rand.NewSource(...)` seeded from wall clock on each call path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
